2606.14284.title: Hierarchical ODE: Learning Continuous-Time Physical Prototypes for Early Link Failure Detection
2606.14284.paper_summary: Time series prototype learning is fundamentally challenged by observational ambiguity. Discrete architectures fail to resolve this, as they lack the capacity to decouple stochastic noise from continuous dynamics. Furthermore, rigid closed-set assumptions fail to capture unseen diversity. To address these limitations, we propose a hierarchical ordinary differential equation clustering network, which utilizes neural ordinary differential equation to model latent state evolution as a continuous integral curve. This formulation enforces temporal continuity to effectively disentangle smooth feature trends from stochastic noise, while our adaptive hierarchical mechanism autonomously determines the appropriate number of prototypes without rigid prior constraints. Validated on the early link failure detection task with irregularly sampled time series, the proposed method effectively extracts underlying physical prototypes, thereby enabling robust failure detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/NJ-LNN/Hierarchical-ODE.
2606.14284.paper_summary_zh: 時間序列原型學習根本上受到觀察模糊性的挑戰。離散架構無法解決這一問題，因為它們缺乏將隨機噪聲與連續動態解耦的能力。此外，僵化的封閉集假設無法捕捉未見的多樣性。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了一種層次性常微分方程聚類網絡，該網絡利用神經常微分方程來建模潛在狀態的演變，作為一條連續的積分曲線。這一表述強制執行時間連續性，有效地將平滑特徵趨勢與隨機噪聲解開，而我們的自適應層次機制則自主決定適當的原型數量，而不受僵化的先驗約束。在不規則取樣的時間序列上的早期鏈接故障檢測任務中進行了驗證，所提出的方法有效地提取了潛在的物理原型，從而實現了穩健的故障檢測。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/NJ-LNN/Hierarchical-ODE 獲得。
2606.14284.author: Jiaen Lv et.al.
2606.14284.authors: Jiaen Lv, Leran Qi, Shaowei Wang
